_README: Юр. данные Digital Chaos Inc. + обновлённые Privacy и Terms для relaxtouchtoday.com. Импортируй через /seo/sites/{id}/import с галкой «Перезаписывать существующие». Обновит site_settings (org_name, org_address) и заменит существующие Privacy + Terms страницы. About страница не трогается.

pages.title: Privacy Policy
pages.meta_description: How RelaxTouch (operated by Digital Chaos Inc.) collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
pages.content_html:
Last updated: May 9, 2026

This Privacy Policy describes how Digital Chaos Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of the State of New York with its registered office at 252 Seaview Ave, Staten Island, NY 10305 ("RelaxTouch," "we," "our," or "us"), collects, uses, and shares information when you visit relaxtouchtoday.com (the "Site") or contact one of our studios.

Information we collect

Information you give us. When you contact a studio or send us a message, you may share your name, phone number, email address, and the contents of your message. When you book a session in person, you may share information about your health, allergies, or pregnancy that helps a therapist work safely.

Information collected automatically. When you visit the Site, our hosting provider and analytics tools may log standard request information including IP address, browser type, the page you visited, and the page that referred you. We use this in aggregate to understand which content is helpful.

Cookies. The Site uses a small number of cookies for analytics and basic functionality. You can disable cookies in your browser at any time without losing access to the Site.

How we use information

We use the information you give us to respond to your inquiries, schedule and deliver your massage, and improve the Site. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.

Sharing

We share information only with service providers who help us run the business — for example, our hosting provider, analytics tool, and payment processor — and only as needed for them to do that work. If we are ever legally required to disclose information, we will do so and notify you where the law allows.

Your rights

You can ask us what information we hold about you, ask us to correct it, or ask us to delete it. Email privacy@relaxtouchtoday.com and we'll respond as quickly as we can — typically within 30 days.

California residents have additional rights under the California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA), including the right to know, the right to delete, and the right to opt out of sale of personal information. We do not sell personal information.

EU/UK residents have rights under GDPR, including access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and portability.

Data security

We use commercially reasonable safeguards to protect your information. No method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure, however, and we cannot guarantee absolute security.

Children

The Site is not intended for children under 16, and we do not knowingly collect information from children under 16.

Changes

If this policy changes, we will update the date at the top and post the new version on this page.

Contact

Questions about this policy:

Digital Chaos Inc.
252 Seaview Ave
Staten Island, NY 10305
Email: privacy@relaxtouchtoday.com

pages.title: Terms of Service
pages.meta_description: Terms of Service governing your use of relaxtouchtoday.com and RelaxTouch wellness massage services, operated by Digital Chaos Inc.
pages.content_html:
Last updated: May 9, 2026

These Terms of Service ("Terms") govern your access to and use of relaxtouchtoday.com (the "Site") and the wellness massage services (the "Services") offered under the brand RelaxTouch by Digital Chaos Inc., a corporation organized under the laws of the State of New York with its registered office at 252 Seaview Ave, Staten Island, NY 10305 ("we," "our," or "us").

By using the Site or the Services, you agree to these Terms. Please read them carefully.

Eligibility

You must be at least 18 years old to use the Services. By booking a session, you represent that you are of legal age and have the capacity to enter into these Terms.

The Services

RelaxTouch operates wellness massage studios at the locations listed on the Site. All massage sessions are performed by licensed massage therapists.

Bookings and cancellations

Sessions are booked directly with each studio. We ask that you give at least 24 hours' notice for cancellation or rescheduling. Late cancellations and no-shows may be charged the full session fee at the studio's discretion.

Health and safety

For your safety and the safety of our therapists, you must disclose any medical conditions, recent surgeries, pregnancy, allergies (especially to nut oils), or injuries before your session. Massage is not appropriate for certain conditions; if you are unsure, consult a physician first.

Conduct

RelaxTouch provides therapeutic and wellness massage only. Inappropriate behavior of any kind, including but not limited to sexual harassment, will result in immediate termination of the session, charging of the full fee, and a permanent ban from all RelaxTouch studios. Our therapists are professionals and will be treated with respect at all times.

Pricing

Prices listed on the Site reflect standard sessions: 15 minutes from $140, 30 minutes from $200, 60 minutes from $230. Add-on services and specialty modalities may be priced separately at each studio.

Site content

Articles and other content on the Site are for general informational purposes only and are not medical advice. Always consult a qualified medical professional for medical concerns.

Intellectual property

All content on the Site (text, graphics, logos, images, software) is the property of Digital Chaos Inc. or its licensors and is protected by copyright and trademark laws. You may not reproduce, modify, or distribute the content without our prior written permission.

Disclaimer

The Site and Services are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied, to the maximum extent permitted by law.

Limitation of liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, Digital Chaos Inc. is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of the Site or the Services. Nothing in these Terms limits liability for negligence causing personal injury where such limitation would be unlawful.

Indemnification

You agree to indemnify and hold harmless Digital Chaos Inc., its officers, directors, employees, and agents from and against any claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses arising from your violation of these Terms or your misuse of the Services.

Governing law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of New York, without regard to conflict-of-law principles. Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms shall be resolved exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Richmond County, New York.

Changes

We may update these Terms from time to time. The "last updated" date above reflects the most recent revision. Continued use of the Site after changes constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

Contact

Digital Chaos Inc.
252 Seaview Ave
Staten Island, NY 10305
Email: hello@relaxtouchtoday.com
